      Show Less

      Features & Design

      Productivity looks better than ever

      Stylish 35.56 cm (14-inch) laptop with on-device Copilot+ featuring Intel® Core™ Ultra processors, stunning performance that powers the newest AI experiences and incredible battery life for on-the-go multitasking.
      Your ideas and Dell 14 Plus AI PC
      Video for Dell 14 Plus launch

      Stylish inside and out

      Sleek design meets stunning performance that streamlines productivity.
      Built-in webcam
      FHD+ and IR features for crystal clear video calls.
      Easy connectivity
      Variety of ports allows you to plug and play anywhere.
      Instant, secure access
      Built-in fingerprint reader available with QHD+ panels.
      WiFi 7
      Experience fast, reliable internet connectivity*.

      *Wi-Fi 7 certified products will roll out in accordance with the Wi-Fi Alliance certification schedule throughout 2024. WiFi 7 requires the latest Wi-Fi Alliance certification, Windows HLK certified device driver, hardware update, supported Windows OS version and compatible router. Wi-Fi 7/ 6E connectivity (6 GHz) with Windows 11 is limited and will leverage prior generation of Wi-Fi 6E/ Wi-Fi 6 speeds until drivers are available and hardware adoption increases. Ubuntu OS will not support Wi-Fi 7 and will operate on WiFi 6E/6 speeds when configured for WiFi 7. Router requires a separate purchase. Wi-Fi 7/ 6E (6 GHz) connectivity is only available in select locations. Check availability with your service provider. The Bluetooth wireless card version may vary depending on the operating system that is installed on your computer.
      AI noise cancellation
      Enjoy clear, distraction-free calls and recordings for enhanced communication.

      Effortlessly tackle the newest AI experiences

      Built from the ground up with Intel’s latest and most advanced client compute engines designed to deliver the newest AI experiences, ultimate power efficiency, and full day cooler and quieter performance that creators and workers need, wherever they are. 

      Intel® Core™ Ultra processors feature dedicated engines for specific tasks, resulting in exceptional performance, efficiency and battery life.
      Announcing slider with 3 slides

      CPU

      Fast Response: Ideal for real time multi-tasking and AI workload such as noise cancellation and instant transcription.

      GPU

      High Throughput: Ideal for AI-accelerated digital content creation and video editing with creation apps like Adobe.

      NPU

      Low Power: Ideal for running AI features like Microsoft Studio Effects during video calls. Supports up to 48 TOPS.

      Create and edit faster with AI

      Software is additional and does not come with system purchase.
      Viewing of 4
      /4

      McAfee

      Detect deepfake audio and video in seconds. Stay protected from deepfake scams and get alerts within seconds so you can stay ahead of financial scams and misinformation. Advanced AI detection models that are offload to the Neural Processing Unit (NPU) for efficient processing, allowing for quick analysis of large volumes of media, with lower latency and 48% less power consumption[1].

      Zoom

      Save up to 41% power, by letting AI algorithms engage the NPU to enhance video quality by adjusting lighting in real-time and use background segmentation for blur effects. Free up the CPU and GPU for better overall responsiveness for a truly seamless video conferencing experience[2].

      Luminar Neo

      Achieve instantly captivating photos with a simple tool. Intelligently apply controls like shadow, highlight, contrast and exposure, or remove unwanted objects, like powerlines, to leave a pristine landscape. Deliver sharp details while keeping the natural look of your photo and intelligently brighten images.

      Upstage

      Achieve effortless writing with WriteUp AI, your on-device writing assistant and craft context specific content securely by leveraging dedicated NPU power to ensure privacy, reduce latency and eliminating cloud dependency. Adjust tone, length or language seamlessly.

      Upgrade to the Dell 14 Plus

      Stay in the flow with an impressive battery in a slim, light design.

      Impressive processing power

      Dedicated engines for demanding tasks deliver exceptional performance, efficiency, & battery life.

      Up to 22 hours*

      Work confidently wherever with impressive battery life that lasts during marathon sessions.

      *Local video playback battery benchmark: Dell 14 Plus tested with Intel Core Ultra 7 256V, FHD+ display, 16GB, 1TB SSD.

      11% Slimmer*, Starting weight 1.55 kg (3.42 lb)

      No need to compromise style for power.

      *Based on internal testing comparing Dell 14 Plus (DB14250) with Inspiron 14 Plus (7440).

      Maximise Your PC

      Get the best out of your PC with the latest Copilot+ PC features. Enhance productivity with ease using your very own AI assistant. Use the Improved Windows Search and reduce time looking for emails, documents and more throughout your day.

      Multitask with ease
      • Multitask with ease
      • Describe it. Find, like Magic.

        Skip the scavenger hunt – just type what you remember and improved Windows Search delivers. Docs, settings, or images? Use File Explorer, Windows Search, or Settings Search[3]. 
      • Need it done? Just ask.

        Copilot Vision understands what’s on your screen, and you can use Voice to ask questions about it, spark ideas or get step-by-step guidance on what to do next.
      • Fly back in time. Find it, instantly.

        Homework? Recipe? YouTube video? Fly back in time to get right back to where you were on your PC. Drop a hint, and Recall (preview) will track it down in seconds, like magic[4].
      • See it, love it, find it.

        Skip the steps. Click to Do lets you interact with images instantly, faster, easier[5].

      Elevated audio and visuals

      See and hear your content truly come to life for photo or video editing, coding, collaborating or even watching movies. Enjoy vivid colours and sharp details on a spacious 16:10 panel with QHD+ resolution, 300 nits brightness and 100% sRGB and Dolby Vision. Hear every detail with stereo quality speakers, powered by Waves Maxx Audio Pro and spatial audio with Dolby Atmos.

      Secure and reliable

      Crafted with high quality materials and designed for durability, all Dell Plus laptops undergo rigorous military-grade testing to ensure exceptional reliability as you put it through the rigors of everyday use. And an additional layer of security with the built-in Trusted Platform Module to protect your data.

      Built sustainably for unstoppable performance

      Your laptop is designed with more sustainable materials like recycled and low emissions aluminium, recycled steel and  recycled ocean-bound plastic while meeting the latest environmental standards like EPEAT Gold with Climate+ and ENERGY STAR® certification[6][7].

      Make everyday easier

      Windows 11 comes with a modern design and multitasking tools to help you get it done faster, easier, and with style.
       
      Your own personal AI assistant built right in to do the heavy-lifting so you can do the extraordinary. With Copilot in Windows get real answers, inspiration, and solutions for your questions, projects, and to-do-list.[8]
       
      Stay connected and do more with Microsoft Teams and Windows Studio Effects. Now you can eliminate distracting sights and sounds and elevate your video calls experience.[9]
      Learn More

      Ports and slots

      Left Facing

      1. USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-A (5 Gbps)
      2. Universal Audio Jack[10]
      Right Facing

      1. HDMI 2.1
      2. USB 3.2 Gen 2 (10 Gbps) Type-C® port with DisplayPort™ 1.4 and Power Delivery
      3. Thunderbolt™ 4 (40 Gbps) with DisplayPort™ 2.1 and Power Delivery

      Dimensions and weight

      1. Height: 16.95 mm (0.67 in.)

      1. Depth: 226.15 mm (8.90 in.)
      2. Width: 314.00 mm (12.36 in.)

      Starting Weight: 1.55 kg (3.42 lb)[11]

      Reliability you can trust

      We continue to improve our product quality and reliability and bundle 1 year of Dell Care Premium with every Dell Premium purchase.

      Heat

      These devices withstand short-term heat up to 65°C (149°F), ensuring durability even in a hot car.

      Everyday stress

      Twisted over 25,000 times, the base and lid are built to handle anything your day demands.

      Wear and tear

      Tested for durability with 1,200 drops, so you toss it in your backpack worry-free.

      Hinges

      Hinges tested 20,000 times so screens open and close with no issues.

      Touch pads

      Tested two million times for lifetime accuracy for clicks and touches, ensuring fast, mistake-free use.

      Power and multimedia buttons

      Power and multimedia buttons are made to last, with stable performance for up to 40,000 presses.

      The Ultimate PC Protection and Support

      Whether for personal use or business, your PC is our priority with expert support at every step.

      Dell Care Premium: Built for you, backed by us

      Enjoy the best in personal PC care with 24/7 expert support for all your hardware and software needs. If we can't fix it remotely, a Dell technician will come to you[12]. SupportAssist predicts and resolves issues while keeping your PC fast, connected and stable[13]. You’ll also get data backup help, parental control setup, and repairs for accidents like drops and spills with no hidden fees or deductible[14]. Plus, stay connected with international travel support.

      ProSupport Plus for PCs: Your business solution

      For Windows Pro OS, upgrade to ProSupport Plus for your business needs. Automate and customise support to eliminate downtime across your fleet. Get 24/7 priority access to in-region technical support, next business day onsite repairs and proactive monitoring. Plus, accidental damage coverage, self-healing automated remediation and more.

      Accidental Damage Service

      Stay worry-free with protection from accidental drops, spills and electrical surges. Access to repairs is easy, with support designed to keep you up and running at your best. Accidental Damage is included with Dell Care Premium and ProSupport Plus.

      Regulatory Product Compliance & Environmental

      Dell Technologies is committed to compliance with the laws and regulations in each country into which the company ships it's products. Dell products are designed and tested to meet the appropriate worldwide standards for Product Safety, Electromagnetic Compatibility, Ergonomics, and other regulatory compulsory requirements when used for their intended purpose.

      In addition, Dell products are developed with design for the environment in mind. Our environmental stewardship program drives conservation of product energy consumption, develops methods to reduce or eliminate materials for disposal, prolongs product life span, and provides effective and convenient equipment recovery solutions.

      For more information:
      Dell Regulatory Compliance Dell and the Environment Product Safety & Environmental Datasheets

      Response from Dell

      Dear Valued Customer, Thank you for your feedback on the Dell 14 Plus Laptop. We’re pleased to hear your new computer is working great for home use and that our sales representative helped you build the right device. It’s always rewarding to know the selection process and final result met your expectations.       5
      Very happy with performance

      Submitted 5 days ago

      By Mogyver

      From Boston, MA

      Verified

      Light, fast, and good battery life for normal household use that I use it for. Shopping was fast and dell has been great to deal with. Color could be made more modern. And would have loved to talk to a human rep for some questions I had. But the IVR never lets you get to a human.

      Response from Dell

      Dear Valued Customer, Thank you for your detailed review of the Dell 14 Plus Laptop. We’re happy to hear its light weight, fast performance, and solid battery life are a great fit for everyday household use. We also appreciate your feedback regarding color options and customer support access—insights like these help us continue improving. If you ever need assistance or want to explore more features, our Dell US Technical support team is always here to help: https://url.dell.com/9b5810. Thank you for being a part of the Dell community. -Surabhi

      Great for home use. Fast response,easy to navigate. Compact size is perfect for my application

      Response from Dell

      Dear Valued Customer, Thank you for your review of the Dell 14 Plus Laptop. We’re pleased to hear it’s been great for home use, offering fast response times, easy navigation, and a compact size that fits your needs perfectly. If you ever need assistance or want to explore more features, our Dell US Technical support team is always here to help: https://url.dell.com/9b5810. Thank you for being a part of the Dell community. -Surabhi

      Would you recommend this product to a friend? Yes

      Was this review helpful to you?
      5
      Laptop for Home

      Submitted 5 days ago

      By Big D

      From Southern Indiana

      Verified

      This is a very nice laptop. It was very easy to order and ready to go. The staff at Dell was great to work with and helpful. I would recommend this laptop to anyone that needs a new one. If you have any issues, the staff at Dell are great to work with.

      Response from Dell

      Dear Valued Customer, Thank you for your kind review of the Dell 14 Plus Laptop. We’re glad to hear the ordering process was smooth and that the laptop was easy to get started with. Your praise for our staff truly means a lot, and we’re happy the system has met your home‑use needs. If you ever need assistance or want to explore more features, our Dell US Technical support team is always here to help: https://url.dell.com/9b5810. Thank you for being a part of the Dell community. -Surabhi

      Would you recommend this product to a friend? Yes

      Was this review helpful to you?

      Response from Dell

      Dear Valued Customer, Thank you for your kind feedback on the Dell 14 Plus Laptop. We’re happy to hear it’s been exactly what you needed for working from home and daily use. Reliable performance that fits seamlessly into both work and life is what we aim to deliver. If you ever need assistance or want to explore more features, our Dell US Technical support team is always here to help: https://url.dell.com/9b5810. We appreciate your trust in Dell and look forward to continuing to support your success. -Surabhi

      5
      Happy with this purchase.

      Submitted 6 days ago

      By Goose

      From Orange County, CA

      Verified

      Use it for my home office thru a KVM switch. Will travel with it, so the light weight is nice. Love the fingerprint reader built into the power button.

      Response from Dell

      Dear Valued Customer, Thank you for your review of the Dell 14 Plus Laptop. We’re happy to hear it works well with your home office setup and that its lightweight design makes it convenient for travel. It’s great to know the integrated fingerprint reader adds to your daily convenience. If you ever need assistance or want to explore more features, our Dell US Technical support team is always here to help: https://url.dell.com/9b5810. We appreciate your trust in Dell and look forward to continuing to support your success. -Surabhi

      Would you recommend this product to a friend? Yes

      Was this review helpful to you?
      5
      Great little laptop

      Submitted 7 days ago

      By aamoore

      From Royse City, Texas

      Verified

      It was somewhat affordable considering the ram prices are really high. I had trouble paying for it with Google pay but was able to pay through PayPal. It's pretty powerful laptop with plenty ram

      Response from Dell

      Dear Valued Customer, Thank you for your thoughtful review! We’re glad to hear that the Dell 14 Plus Laptop delivers strong performance and ample RAM, even amid rising memory prices. We also appreciate you sharing your checkout experience and are happy everything worked out. For future reference, if you ever need assistance or want to explore more features, our Dell US Technical Support team is always here to help: https://url.dell.com/9b5810. Thank you for being a part of the Dell community. –Surabhi

      Would you recommend this product to a friend? Yes

      Was this review helpful to you?
      5
      Performing well

      Submitted 7 days ago

      By PWW

      From Atlanta GA

      Verified

      Needed a smaller but decent performance laptop easy to carry everywhere out of office to stay productive, with the Dell case I got afterwards it is filling my need well.

      Response from Dell

      Dear Valued Customer, Thank you for your review of the Dell 14 Plus Laptop! We’re happy to hear that its balance of portability and performance is supporting your productivity on the go. Pairing it with a Dell case was a great choice, and we’re glad the setup fits your mobile work needs perfectly. If you ever need assistance or want to explore more features, our Dell US Technical support team is always here to help: https://url.dell.com/9b5810. We appreciate your trust in Dell and look forward to continuing to support your success. –Surabhi

      Would you recommend this product to a friend? Yes

      Was this review helpful to you?
      5
      Missing items

      Submitted 7 days ago

      By Albert

      From Pennsylvania

      Verified

      I was supposed to receive a wireless mouse and a backpack to carry my laptop but I never received it. I still would like to receive those items please.

      Response from Dell

      Dear Valued Customer, Thank you for your review of the Dell 14 Plus Laptop. We appreciate you sharing your experience and understand your concern regarding the missing wireless mouse and backpack. We want to ensure you receive everything included with your order, and our support team can help review the shipment details and next steps. For any issues related to missing parts please reach out to our Dell US Customer care team: https://url. dell. com/5f4f64. For technical assistance you may reach our Dell US Technical support team https://url.dell.com/9b5810. Thank you for being a part of the Dell community. –Surabhi

      Do you have an Account? Login

      Social Share

      This website uses cookies and other tracking technologies to enhance user experience and to analyse performance and traffic on our website. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners. If we have detected an opt-out preference signal then it will be honoured. Further information is available in our Cookie Notice.

      Your Cookie Preferences

      Dell uses different types of cookies to optimise your experience and enable certain website features, as well as cookies from third parties for purposes such as: improving your overall web browsing experience, connecting you with your social networks and tailoring advertising to better match your interests. Click on the categories below to learn more and adjust your settings, which will be applied to the device you are currently using. You can access this tool on your other devices to customise those settings, and use this tool from any of your devices at any time to opt out of certain cookies. Please note that blocking some types of cookies may impact your site experience and services or features we are able to offer. You can learn more about how we use cookies by visiting our Cookie Notice.
      Cookie Policy

      Manage Consent Preferences

      Essential

      Always Active

      These cookies are essential for enabling user movement around our website and providing access to features such as your profile and purchases, log in credentials, and other areas of the website. These cookies are necessary to enable the basic features of this site to function, such as providing secure log-in, allowing images to load, or allowing you to select your cookie preferences. This category of cookies cannot be disabled.

      Marketing

      Marketing cookies are used to understand user behavior across our websites. These cookies are also used to show ads that are more relevant to your interests. We may share this information with advertising platforms to help us display the most relevant messages to you. These cookies may also store information on user behavior obtained through their browsing habits, which allows us to develop a specific profile and display advertisements appropriate to your profile.

      Uncategorized

      Always Inactive

      Cookies that are not categorized.

      Statistical

      Statistical cookies help us to understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information. Any information collected by means of this type of cookies is used to measure activity on any website, application or platform, for the purposes of introducing improvements in function of the analysis of the data regarding the service use made by users.

      Cookie List

      Your Privacy [`dialog closed`]
      1. Based on internal analysis and testing, November 2024. McAfee's Deepfake Detector running on devices with Intel® Core™ Ultra 200V series processors was compared to previous-generation Intel® Core™ Ultra processors. Results may vary.  [ ↑ ]
      2. Based on internal analysis and testing, compared to previous generation Intel® Core™ Ultra processor, September 2024. Select AI-enhanced collaboration features include, eye contact correction, standard blur, portrait blur, automatic framing, calls with audio only, virtual background. Results may vary. [ ↑ ]
      3. Works with specific text, image, and document formats only; optimised for select languages (English, Chinese (Simplified), French, German, Japanese, and Spanish). See aka.ms/copilotpluspcs. [ ↑ ]
      4. Works with specific text, image, and document formats only; optimised for select languages (English, Chinese (Simplified), French, German, Japanese, and Spanish). See aka.ms/copilotpluspcs. [ ↑ ]
      5. Image actions now available across devices; other actions vary by device, region, language, and character sets. Subscription required for some actions. Coming to the European Economic Area later in 2025. See aka.ms/copilotpluspcs. [ ↑ ]
      6. Based on internal analysis, December 2024. Top cover: 50% recycled and 50% low emissions aluminium, Fan-housing:25% recycled ocean-bound plastic, Palmrest support bracket:15% recycled steel. [ ↑ ]
      7. Based on internal analysis, December 2024. EPEAT registered where applicable. EPEAT registration varies by country. See www.epeat.net for registration status by country. [ ↑ ]
      8. Timing of feature delivery varies by device. Feature availability varies by market. Requires Microsoft account sign in. [ ↑ ]
      9. Windows Studio Effects (background blur, eye contact, voice focus, and automatic framing) are hardware dependent and require a qualified Neural Processing Unit (NPU). [ ↑ ]
      10. 3.5mm Universal Audio Jack functionality varies by model configuration. For best results, use Dell recommended audio accessories. [ ↑ ]
      11. Weights vary depending on configurations and manufacturing variability. [ ↑ ]
      12. Onsite service after remote diagnosis (a) Onsite Service after remote diagnosis is determined by the online or phone technician, and may involve customer access to the inside of the system and multiple extended sessions. If the issue is covered by the Limited Hardware Warranty and cannot be resolved remotely, the technician and/or replacement part will be dispatched, usually in 1 or 2 business days, following the completion of the remote diagnosis. The customer must return the original hardware to Dell according to the rules specified. On-site service is provided by Dell Marketing L.P; Availability varies. Other conditions apply. (b) Advanced Exchange Service replaces hardware after remote diagnosis. The customer must return the original hardware to Dell according to the rules specified. Advanced Exchange Service is subject to country availability. (c) For complete details about On-site Service or Advanced Exchange Service, see dell.com/servicecontracts. [ ↑ ]
      13. For supported systems and requirements, please refer to our user guide (SupportAssist for Home PCs version for personal use) or administrator guide (SupportAssist for Business PCs version for PC fleet management) and click "supported PCs". Proactive and predictive capabilities depend upon your active service plan and Dell Technologies business rules. For ProSupport Suite for PCs capabilities, view our administrator guide and click "Connect and manage capabilities and Dell service plans". For Dell Care Suite, Premium Support Suite, or Alienware Care Suite for PCs capabilities, view the user guide and click "SupportAssist capabilities and Dell Services plans".​ [ ↑ ]
      14. Accidental damage coverage excludes theft, loss, and damage due to fire, flood, or other acts of nature, or intentional damage. Customer must return damaged unit. Limit of 1 qualified incident per contract year. [ ↑ ]
